Fever trailing by 10 at half, 40-30, after Valkyries close on a 16-7 run.

Fever kept to 35% shooting (and eight TOs). Eight different players have scored. Will be curious how Clark (back) feels coming out of the locker room.

items.title: Stephanie White called a timeout down 12-2. Then, after subbing in three, they flipped the script.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Stephanie White called a timeout down 12-2. Then, after subbing in three, they flipped the script.

Outscored the Valkyries 16-8 over the final 5mins to trim the deficit to just two after 1. 20-18. Mitchell has nine points.

GSV does a great job of making everything difficult.

Lanier: 15 pts
